---
title: "SMARTX_NH4_Collate"
output: pdf_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---



```{r}

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}

year <- "2025"

nh3_path <- "GCReW_SMARTX_Porewater_NH4_"

NH3_may_dat <- read.csv(here("SMARTX", "Porewater", "Ammonium", year, "Processed Data", paste0(nh3_path, year, "05", ".csv")))

NH3_july_dat <- read.csv(here("SMARTX", "Porewater", "Ammonium", year, "Processed Data", paste0(nh3_path, year, "07", ".csv")))

NH3_sept_dat <- read.csv(here("SMARTX", "Porewater", "Ammonium", year, "Processed Data", paste0(nh3_path, year, "09", ".csv")))

```

```{r}

NH3_dat <- rbind(NH3_july_dat[,-1], NH3_may_dat[,-1], NH3_sept_dat[,-1])

```

```{r}
write.csv(NH3_dat, paste0("SMARTX_Porewater_NH4_", year, ".csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```
